# Incident Communications

## Purpose
Use this skill for internal and external incident updates.

## Triggers
- "status update"
- "stakeholder message"
- "customer incident notice"

## Outputs
- Current status statement
- Impact statement
- Actions in progress
- Next update time

## Example Prompts
- "Write an internal update for leadership on this sev2 latency incident."
- "Draft a customer-facing status page update with clear impact and ETA language."
